methodology: KTLO objectives focused on installed-base reliability, evidence governance, and municipal trust maintenance.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Keep live municipal deployments reliable and compliant
objectives.objective: Protect field uptime, evidence governance, and support quality across the installed base while product teams pursue growth objectives.

keyResults.target: Maintain high uptime across live field deployments
keyResults.baseline: Growth in installed municipalities increases maintenance and support load.
keyResults.statement: Maintain fleet uptime through stronger health monitoring, proactive maintenance, and controlled field rollouts.

executingTeams.intent: Lead installed-base uptime and field reliability work.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Municipal trust is fragile if live deployments go dark or drift into unreliable operation.

target1.label: 2026-Q3 target
target1.target: Maintain high uptime across live field deployments
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: uptime remains stable despite growth in active sites.

target2.label: 2026-year-end target
target2.target: Maintain high uptime across live field deployments
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: uptime remains within acceptable municipal service levels through year end.
